titleStmt.title: SII 39.138: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 138. (A.R. No. 138 of 1916.) MĒLŪR, PONNERI TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. SUGANDAPURIŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE NORTH AND WEST WALLS OF THE SAME SHRINE.

summary.p: This inscription refers to a gift of some voluntary contribution of merchandise like paddy by the merchant assembly called ‘the palar of 56 desam’ for food offerings in the temple of Tirumaṇaṅgāvuḍaiya-Tambīrāṉār at Vallūr for the merit of Rāchchaviṭṭi-nāyaka on the instructions given by Tirumalai-nāyaka. They also agreed to bear certain expenditure connected with the performance of festivities. They belonged to many places like Chandiragiri, Tiruppati, Kālakasti, Maṇḍiyam, Vēlumpādi, Toṇḍaimāṉāṟṟūr, Nāraṇapuram, Nagari, Āraṇi, Kottappāḷaiyam, Muttaram mēḍu, Chērambaḍi Pūṇḍi, Koḷḷūr, Chōḻappattar, Chōḻapuram, Kōḍambākkam, Puliyūr, and Mayilāppūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tuṉtumi varuṣam Āvaṇi mātam
10 5 tiyati śrīmat cantirakiri tiruppati
kāḷahasti maṇṭiyam velum
pāṭi toṇṭaimāṉāṟṟūr nāraṇa
puram nakari Āraṇi kottappāḷai
yam nallāṟṟūrpāḷaiyam mut
tāmmeṭu cerampaṭippūṇṭi ko
ḷḷūr coḻappaṭṭai coḻapuram
koṭampākkam puliyūr mayilā
ppūr mutalāṉa Aṉpattāṟu teca
ttu palarum puḻalkoṭṭamā
ṉa vallūr tampirāṉār tirumaṇaṅ
kāvuṭaiya tampirāṉār nammuṭa
yammamāka vallūrle cattam
piṭaccayeruttu ṉām kaḷañciyatti
le nellu koṇṭayeruttu
ṉām ṉūṟupotikku Oru paṇṭamā
ka rāccaviṭṭa nāyakkarukku puṇṇi
yamāka nāyakarruṭaiya mutti
rai maṉuṣar tirumalai nāyakkar
kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭukaiyil nām Intapa
ṭi cantirātittai varaiyum na
ṭattak kaṭavomākavum Inta
nelkkoṇṭu tirumaṇaṅkā
vuṭaiya tampirāṉārkku m
Intat taṉmam mātam mātam tappāmal Inta mutalk
kāttārum kaṭaiṉā kūṭṭakaḷum
kavum Inta potivakaiyil vanta tara varuṣa
vum vākaippaṭikkup poka ṅ kiḻaiyūr
veḷārkkaḷum māṉiyam me ṭṭārum Oru Upaiy
yamum tirumaṇaṅkā Ūrārum paṇṭārattāru
m Oru Upaiyamum viyāpārikaḷ Oru Upai
yamum yiṭaiyarum civampaṭavarum Iḻai mū
ñcikaḷum Oru Upaiyamum mutalikaḷil Iraṇṭu Upaiyamum
kaṇakkuppiḷḷaikaḷ Oru Upaiyamum naṭattak kaṭavommākavum
Itilum Ammāvacaippaṭikku kuṟaipaṭṭate Uṇṭāṉāl
tirumaṇaṅkāvuṭaiya nayiṉār koyil mutalilē Iṭṭu
naṭatta kaṭavārākavum tirumalai nāyakkar vacca teṉṉa
maram Amāvācaipaṭikke naṭattak kaṭavarkaḷḷā
vum Ittaṉmattukku yāto
ruttar Akitam niṉaitte yuṇṭā
ṉāl tevarukkum tecaṅkaḷukkum
rammāy pokakaṭavārkaḷ
Digital edition of SII 39.138 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
